title: AI Bust Risks Ripple Effects from Growth to Credit, BIS Says
abstract: Are you worried about the ripple effects of growth on your business? Fear not, this AI tool is here to help! It can dig deep into data like a detective to identify risk factors and ensure your investments are secure. As BIS notes, it's like adding a safety lock to your growth.
abstract_zh: 你是不是经常担心公司扩张会带来的一系列风险？别怕，这款AI工具来帮你了！它能像侦探一样挖掘数据背后的风险因子，确保你的投资稳健前行。BIS说，有了它，就像给成长加了一把保护锁！
